item.title: Animal Logic's USDMaya integration
item.author: Author
item.description: At Animal Logic, we have been working on an open source integration of USD in Maya, in this post you can see a short demo of how things are going so far.

item.title: Naming
item.author: Author
item.description: Join me on this video series coding a naming convention manager step by step, 10 minutes at a time.

item.title: dgpy
item.author: Author
item.description: A naive dependency graph implemented in python, coded live in a test-driven development fashion.

item.description: A new version of quickluncher is out, read here the updates

item.title: Driving serialization via dunder methods
item.author: Author
item.description: Article on how riglab's serialize/deserialize programmatic objects via serialized metadata and python magic methods.

item.title: Git For Softimage
item.author: Author
item.description: Open source integration of Git as version control system for Softimage projects.

item.title: Handling naming conventions
item.author: Author
item.description: Thoughts around naming conventions during the development of RigLab
